RegionBehavior.fallout-maw.periodicDamage: Apply configured damage to tokens inside the region on subscribed region events.

Actions.Title: Actions
Actions.CostHint: The percentage applies to the final attack cost and is rounded up (50% of 5 = 3).

pre.Label: Before commit
pre.Description: Awaited before the action is committed; observers may modify or cancel it.

gate.Label: Reaction window
gate.Description: Awaited interruption window before the workflow continues.

query.Label: Synchronous calculation
query.Description: Synchronous calculation hook; API-only and not selectable as a reaction condition.

enginePre.Label: Synchronous engine pre-hook
enginePre.Description: Synchronous engine pre-hook; API-only and not selectable as a reaction condition.

committed.Label: After completion
committed.Description: Emitted after the workflow commits or reaches its terminal result.

transition.Label: State transition
transition.Description: Emitted after a persisted gameplay state transition.

Reaction.UnsupportedCondition: This condition is not supported by event reactions. It is preserved but remains inert.
Reaction.UnsupportedEvent: This saved event is unavailable or cannot open a reaction window. The value is preserved but remains inert.
Reaction.UnsupportedPenalties: Failure penalties are not supported by event reactions. Existing rows are preserved but remain inert.
Reaction.UnknownEventDescription: This saved event is not present in the current catalog.
Reaction.Title: Reaction
Reaction.Opportunity: Actors have an opportunity to react.
Reaction.MovementLocked: Waiting for reactions: movement is temporarily locked.
Reaction.CostUnavailable: The reaction cost is no longer available.

CostErrors.InvalidFormula: The reaction cost formula is invalid.
CostErrors.MissingResourceKey: Select a resource for every reaction cost row.
CostErrors.UnknownResourceKey: The configured reaction resource is unavailable.
CostErrors.MissingResource: The reactor does not have the required resource.
CostErrors.InsufficientResource: The reactor does not have enough resources.
CostErrors.StaleQuote: The reaction cost changed; try again.
CostErrors.SpendFailed: The reaction cost could not be spent.

Factions.ActorHint: Mark the faction this actor belongs to, then set that faction's attitude toward the others. Scores from 61 to 100 are allies, from -40 to -100 are enemies, the rest are neutral.

Presets.Title: Fallout-MaW: Settings Presets
Presets.Heading: Settings Presets
Presets.Description: Select which portable set of world settings this world uses, or share a set as a JSON file.
Presets.Name: Preset name
Presets.MainCannotDelete: The main Fallout-MaW preset cannot be deleted.

Create.Heading: Create a preset
Create.Hint: A new preset starts as a full copy of the main Fallout-MaW preset.

Import.Heading: Import a preset
Import.Hint: Choose a standalone preset JSON file or a legacy baseline snapshot.
Import.ReplaceContent: Preset "{name}" ({id}) already exists. Importing this file will replace it completely. Continue?

Delete.Title: Delete {name}
Delete.Content: Remove preset "{name}" only from this world's library? Presets owned by other GMs are not affected.
Delete.ActiveWarning: The main Fallout-MaW preset will become active in this world.

Warnings.FileRequired: Choose a preset JSON file first.
Warnings.OnlyGM: Only a GM can manage settings presets.

Errors.ApiUnavailable: The settings presets manager is not initialized.
Errors.InvalidJson: The selected file is not valid settings preset JSON.

Combat.Title: Combat Settings
Combat.DodgeAttackCostPercent: Cost per attack, % of maximum dodge
Combat.ReactionTimeoutHint: Shared timeout for collecting all owner responses. The default is 20 seconds.
Combat.AreaMovementDamageThresholdFormula: Movement inside an area deals damage after N movement points
Combat.AreaMovementDamageThresholdHint: Evaluated per actor. ОД and ОП are the resource maximums; the result is rounded down with a minimum of 1.

HUD.Title: HUD Settings
HUD.NoPushWeapon: No available weapon has the Push action.
HUD.NoPushTargets: No targets in the push cone.
HUD.PushTargetAdjacent: The push target must be adjacent.
HUD.NoDragCell: No valid adjacent cell for dragging.
HUD.GrappleTargetAdjacent: The grapple target must be adjacent.
HUD.NoActiveGMTokenUpdate: No active GM is available to update tokens.
HUD.GMNoResponseActiveAction: GM did not answer the active action request.
HUD.GrappleEscapeMovePrompt: {target} is grappled by {grappler}. Try to escape for {cost} AP?
HUD.GrappledTargetCannotMove: The grappled target cannot be moved there.
